2975879.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2975879.description: The rats have been terrorizing Roger the alligator. He asks the penguins for help. Their solution: swap Roger's brain with Rico's, and let the but kicking begin! / A robot is sent to the zoo to learn the habits of lemurs before it's sent into space.

2975964.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2975964.description: When the penguins bring Marlene with them on a sno-cone mission in the park, she can't handle the freedom of being outside the zoo walls. / Max the cat is on the run from evil animal control Officer X, and he comes to the penguins for help.

2980348.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2980348.description: When the penguins are interrupted mid-operation by a nosey scientist, they leave the zoo in danger.

2981330.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2981330.description: Kowalski accidentally creates a living blob of jelly. But 'Jiggles' has a big appetite and starts stealing fruit from the animals. / When a new TV show starts keeping people from coming to the zoo, the animals worry they'll lose their home.

2987711.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2987711.description: When Rico gets a freaky fortune from his cookie, he initially ignores it. Julien sets out to make Rico's fortune come true. / A female chimp named Lulu arrives at the zoo for a short stay, and Phil is smitten. Unfortunately, Lulu falls for Mason.

2988059.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2988059.description: On watch-duty, Private sees a terrifying Skorka: a sky orca whale. No one believes it exists, so Private sets out to battle the Sorka on his own. / When the penguins are interrupted mid-operation by a nosey scientist, they leave the zoo in danger.

2990561.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2990561.description: On watch-duty, Private sees a terrifying Skorka: a sky orca whale. No one believes that it exists, so Private sets out to battle the Sorka on his own.

2991132.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
2991132.description: When a big fish starts terrorizing the inhabitants of the duck pond, Skipper leads his team on a mission to eliminate the aquatic menace. / When a beautiful female falcon crash-lands in the zoo, Skipper insists that she stays to recuperate.

3016804.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3016804.description: A little girl loses her doll at the zoo, and Rico gives up his own doll to replace it. Private assures Rico that his good deed will come back to him. / When a raccoon shows up and starts stealing from the zoo animals, the penguins jump into action.

3017577.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3017577.description: Julien is horrified when the baboons' dance routine gets more attention than his own. His attempts to sabotage the baboons blow up in his face. / There's a blackout and Julien convinces everyone they should revert to "jungle law" with him as king.

3020778.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3020778.description: Mort is exposed to Kowalski's super-ray, and he grows super-big and strong. / Marlene gets a new roommate! At first, she's excited to have a new best friend. But her attitude changes when her roommate turns out to have some pretty disgusting habits.

3021591.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3021591.description: The penguins compete against the lemurs in a game of capture the flag.

3038409.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3038409.description: When Skipper is knocked on the head, he's unable to lead the penguins on an important mission. / Private accidentally drinks Kowalski's truth serum and starts spilling the penguin's secrets to the rest of the zoo.

3039239.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3039239.description: The lemurs argue, and Maurice and Mort move out of the habitat. Lonely Julien starts bugging the penguins, who decide they must get the lemurs back together. / A tiny frog with a nasty attitude moves to the zoo and starts terrorizing the animals.

3043074.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3043074.description: The rats have been terrorizing Roger the alligator. He asks the penguins for help. Their solution: swap Roger's brain with Rico's, and let the but kicking begin! / A robot is sent to the zoo to learn the habits of lemurs before it's sent into space.

3043147.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3043147.description: Marlene goes over to meet the newest zoo animal, and she mysteriously disappears. The penguins and lemurs try to rescue her, but they are taken, too.

3010815.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3010815.description: When Burt the elephant asks the penguins to help him sneak out of the zoo, they take on the challenge and get the big guy out. / Marlene catches a glimpse of Fred the squirrel and falls in love at first sight.

3011165.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3011165.description: When Alice mentions that one of the penguins is actually female, Skipper has an identity crisis. / After a big fight Mason moves out-and in with the penguins. Unfortunately, Mason is a very annoying house guest.

3012565.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3012565.description: When the penguins bring Marlene with them on a sno-cone mission in the park, she can't handle the freedom of being outside the zoo walls. / Max the cat is on the run from evil animal control Officer X, and he comes to the penguins for help.

3012625.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3012625.description: When Julien is taken to the infirmary for acting even weirder than usual, Maurice is left in charge.

3019938.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3019938.description: Kowalski accidentally creates a living blob of jelly. But 'Jiggles' has a big appetite and starts stealing fruit from the animals. / When a new TV show starts keeping people from coming to the zoo, the animals worry they'll lose their home.

3020290.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3020290.description: When a big fish starts terrorizing the inhabitants of the duck pond, Skipper leads his team on a mission to eliminate the aquatic menace. / When a beautiful female falcon crash-lands in the zoo, Skipper insists that she stays to recuperate.

3021968.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3021968.description: When Rico gets a freaky fortune from his cookie, he initially ignores it. Julien sets out to make Rico's fortune come true. / A female chimp named Lulu arrives at the zoo for a short stay, and Phil is smitten. Unfortunately, Lulu falls for Mason.

3022018.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3022018.description: The penguins and lemurs face off in a race. The penguins in a souped-up version of their car and the lemurs in Alice's zoo cart. Winner takes the loser's car!

3093996.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3093996.description: Every year, Private is chosen as the cover animal for the zoo brochure. But this year the photographer discovers the adorable Mort. / A puffin rival from Skipper's past shows up. Skipper doesn't trust his claims that he's here to bury the hatchet.

3039622.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3039622.description: Every year, Private is chosen as the cover animal for the zoo brochure. But this year the photographer discovers the adorable Mort. / A puffin rival from Skipper's past shows up. Skipper doesn't trust his claims that he's here to bury the hatchet.

3013194.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3013194.description: A little girl loses her doll at the zoo, and Rico gives up his own doll to replace it. Private assures Rico that his good deed will come back to him. / When a raccoon shows up and starts stealing from the zoo animals, the penguins jump into action.

3020194.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3020194.description: A little girl loses her doll at the zoo, and Rico gives up his own doll to replace it. Private assures Rico that his good deed will come back to him. / When a raccoon shows up and starts stealing from the zoo animals, the penguins jump into action.

3020260.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3020260.description: When the zoo starts feeding them imitation fish cakes, the penguins take matters into their own flippers and hatch a plan to hijack a fish delivery truck.

3034925.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3034925.description: When Skipper is knocked on the head, he's unable to lead the penguins on an important mission. / Private accidentally drinks Kowalski's truth serum and starts spilling the penguin's secrets to the rest of the zoo.

3041797.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3041797.description: Julien is horrified when the baboons' dance routine gets more attention than his own. His attempts to sabotage the baboons blow up in his face. / There's a blackout and Julien convinces everyone they should revert to "jungle law" with him as king.

3041871.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3041871.description: During a particularly cold day, the rats show up and challenge the penguins to a hockey match.

3060146.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3060146.description: When Skipper is knocked on the head, he's unable to lead the penguins on an important mission. / Private accidentally drinks Kowalski's truth serum and starts spilling the penguin's secrets to the rest of the zoo.

3060864.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3060864.description: During a solar eclipse, Phil and Mason convince the bossy Julien that the sky spirits are angry at him. He starts acting extra-nice.

3080061.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3080061.description: The lemurs argue, and Maurice and Mort move out of the habitat. Lonely Julien starts bugging the penguins, who decide they must get the lemurs back together. / A tiny frog with a nasty attitude moves to the zoo and starts terrorizing the animals.

3080548.title: Pinguïns van Madagascar
3080548.description: When the vet rounds up the penguins to give them a shot, Skipper's fear of needles takes over and he goes on the run.
